REMITTITUR FILED ORDER IN RE: ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL. ABANDONMENT OF APPEAL HAVING BEEN FILED BY APPELLANT ON MARCH 3, 1995. IT IS ORDERED THAT THE APPEAL IN THE ABOVE ENTITLED ACTION BE DISMISSED PURSUANT TO CRC 133.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CALJONE, OURA ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $2,957.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,957.75, JUDGMENT IS TO BE ENTERED NUNC PRO TUNC AS OF DEC. 6, 1994.
